meta.note: Gallery page story blocks. imageId must match an id in src/data/gallery.json items.

title: Stories behind the photos
subtitle: Every frame has context. Here are a few events guests still talk about.

items.title: Corporate offsite in Ahmedabad
items.context: 120 team members, mixed departments, one afternoon of facilitator-led challenges that turned quiet colleagues into cheering teammates.

items.title: School annual fest
items.context: A campus-wide celebration where students rotated through high-energy rounds while teachers kept the schedule on track.

items.title: Community festival
items.context: Neighbours of every age lined up for traditional games and Bollywood rounds until the society lawn was full of laughter.
